# Test Fixtures

This directory is reserved for synthetic, non-sensitive test fixtures. Real targets,
credentials, and attack payloads are prohibited.

The `v1alpha1/` fixtures exercise protocol structure and semantic validation only.
They do not identify external systems or invoke tools.

The `p5_5/` fixtures exercise CLI/API/Web consistency with synthetic local tasks:
low-risk success, unauthorized target denial, high-risk unapproved denial,
cross-midnight time-window policy, parser invalid output, and partial failure.
